positive: A stylized, intricate forest biome composition featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, elegant fox silhouettes, and intertwined celestial vines. The style should be a combination of Art Nouveau and mystical geometry, rendered with thick, sharp linework and high contrast. Focus on deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) mixed with luminous gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centralized, creating a strong, isolated vignette suitable for apparel printing. Ensure all elements have clear, clean outlines and a slightly stained-glass, etched quality. Cinematic volumetric lighting, extremely detailed, vector-illustration quality.
